name:
Ss PETER & PAUL, APOSTLES (JUN 29) 
AT THE VIGIL MASS [ABC]

readings.summary: Get up and walk in the name of Christ.

readings.citation:
At the Vigil Mass — Ps 19:2-3, 4-5, R. v.5
Their message goes out through all the earth.
readings.antiphon:
At the Vigil Mass — Ps 19:2-3, 4-5, R. v.5
Their message goes out through all the earth.

readings.summary: Paul describes his conversion and mission.
Lord, you know everything: you know that I love you.
Paul tells Simon to tend his sheep.

antiphons.text:
Peter the Apostle, and Paul the teacher of the Gentiles,
these have taught us your law, O Lord.

Simon, Son of John, do you love me more than these?
Lord, you know everything; you know that I love you.

penitentialAct.title: Kyrie • Misa Del Mundo
penitentialAct.composer: Only if needed. Talk to presider!

responsorialPsalm.psalm: Ps 19 Their message goes out through all...
responsorialPsalm.setting: The Lyric Psalter • Tony Alonso & Marty Haugen

gospelAcclamation.title: Alleluia (Mass of Joy & Peace)
gospelAcclamation.composer: Ss Peter & Paul (V) | ABC — "Lord, you know..."
gospelAcclamation.verse: Lord, you know everything: you know that I love you.

offertory.title: Christ In Me Arise
offertory.description: “Be now my footsteps... taking me where I must go.”

fractionRite.title: Lamb of God (Mass of the Holy Family)

sending.title: We Belong To You
